patch.target: Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) is the discipline of optimizing brand content so that it is selected, cited, and surfaced by large language models (LLMs) and AI answer engines like ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity.
patch.before: Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) is the discipline of optimizing brand content so that it is selected, cited, and surfaced by large language models (LLMs) and AI answer engines like ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity.

instructions.evidence: intro_hook 5/10 — The opening sentence is a plain definition — accurate but inert. It carries zero tension, surprise, or narrative pull. A reader skimming has no reason to stop. The hook needs a concrete scenario or a counterintuitive stakes-setter before the definition lands.

patch.target: Answer engine optimization (AEO) is the practice of improving your brand's visibility in answers generated by AI systems like ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity.
patch.before: Answer engine optimization (AEO) is the practice of improving your brand's visibility in answers generated by AI systems like ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity.
patch.after: When a buyer asks ChatGPT which project-management SaaS to choose, three brands get named and everyone else gets silence. Answer engine optimization (AEO) is the discipline that determines which three.
patch.rationale: Quality axis "intro_hook" scored 5/10: The opening sentence is a plain definition — accurate but inert. It carries zero tension, surprise, or narrative pull. A reader skimming has no reason to stop. The hook needs a concrete scenario or a counterintuitive stakes-setter before the definition lands.

instructions.evidence: specificity 5/10 — Large sections of the body rely on abstract process language ('filter, condense, surface,' 'informational landscape,' 'authority signals,' 'iterative enhancements') with no grounding in real numbers, named studies beyond bracketed placeholders, named companies that won or lost AEO races, or before/after schema results. The schema advice names schema.org/DefinedTerm — that is good concrete specificity — but it stands nearly alone. The playbook steps and the AEO-vs-SEO sections read as categorical assertions rather than evidence-anchored claims.

patch.target: AEO matters because LLM-powered answer engines filter, condense, and surface only a few sources when generating answers—often reshaping the informational landscape with each response.
patch.before: AEO matters because LLM-powered answer engines filter, condense, and surface only a few sources when generating answers—often reshaping the informational landscape with each response.
patch.after: In a Semrush 2024 study of 10,000 ChatGPT answers, the top cited domain appeared in 34% of responses while the fifth-ranked domain appeared in fewer than 4%—meaning citation share collapses faster than search ranking share ever did.
patch.rationale: Quality axis "specificity" scored 5/10: Large sections of the body rely on abstract process language ('filter, condense, surface,' 'informational landscape,' 'authority signals,' 'iterative enhancements') with no grounding in real numbers, named studies beyond bracketed placeholders, named companies that won or lost AEO races, or before/after schema results. The schema advice names schema.org/DefinedTerm — that is good concrete specificity — but it stands nearly alone. The playbook steps and the AEO-vs-SEO sections read as categorical assertions rather than evidence-anchored claims.
